assignments.direction: Implement a Constraint Programming (CP) model using OR-Tools with interval variables and cumulative constraints, focusing on the 'NoOverlap' constraint for machine resources.
Develop a Genetic Algorithm using a permutation-with-repetition encoding and Precedence Preservative Crossover (PPX) to maintain job order validity.
Implement a Tabu Search algorithm utilizing the Nowicki-Smutnicki (N5) neighborhood structure, which focuses on swapping adjacent operations on the critical path.
Apply the Giffler-Thompson algorithm to generate active schedules, testing various priority rules like Shortest Processing Time (SPT) and Most Work Remaining (MWKR).
Implement a Simulated Annealing approach using a geometric cooling schedule and a move operator that shifts an operation to a different position within its valid range on a machine.
Develop an Ant Colony Optimization (ACO) metaheuristic where pheromone trails are deposited on the edges representing the sequence of operations on each machine.
Formulate and solve a Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) model using the Manne disjunctive formulation to establish exact lower bounds for small instances.
Implement a Shifting Bottleneck Heuristic (SBH) that iteratively solves single-machine scheduling subproblems to sequence the most constrained machines first.
